'''motadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ileofemoral|ileofemoral]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-t-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ileofemoral|ileofemoral]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| motadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:motadhithi|motadhithi]] || [[word:motadhiji|motadhiji]] || [[word:motadhishi|motadhishi]] || [[word:motadhiki|motadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:motadhuthuthu|motadhuthuthu]] || [[word:motadhujuju|motadhujuju]] || [[word:motadhushushu|motadhushushu]] || [[word:motadhukuku|motadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:motadhuthu|motadhuthu]] || [[word:motadhuju|motadhuju]] || [[word:motadhushu|motadhushu]] || [[word:motadhuku|motadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:motadhufthuf|motadhufthuf]] || [[word:motadhufjuf|motadhufjuf]] || [[word:motadhufshuf|motadhufshuf]] || [[word:motadhufkuf|motadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:motadhethe|motadhethe]] || [[word:motadheje|motadheje]] || [[word:motadheshe|motadheshe]] || [[word:motadheke|motadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:motadhothotho|motadhothotho]] || [[word:motadhojojo|motadhojojo]] || [[word:motadhoshosho|motadhoshosho]] || [[word:motadhokoko|motadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:motadhotho|motadhotho]] || [[word:motadhojo|motadhojo]] || [[word:motadhosho|motadhosho]] || [[word:motadhoko|motadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:motadhofthof|motadhofthof]] || [[word:motadhofjof|motadhofjof]] || [[word:motadhofshof|motadhofshof]] || [[word:motadhofkof|motadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:motadhĂŻfthĂŻf|motadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:motadhĂŻfjĂŻf|motadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:motadhĂŻfshĂŻf|motadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:motadhĂŻfkĂŻf|motadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:motadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|motadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:motadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|motadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:motadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|motadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:motadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|motadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:motadhĂŻfthĂŻf|motadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:motadhĂŻfjĂŻf|motadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:motadhĂŻfshĂŻf|motadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:motadhĂŻfkĂŻf|motadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:motadhĂŻfthĂŻf|motadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:motadhĂŻfjĂŻf|motadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:motadhĂŻfshĂŻf|motadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:motadhĂŻfkĂŻf|motadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:motadhĂŠthĂŠ|motadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:motadhĂŠjĂŠ|motadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:motadhĂŠshĂŠ|motadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:motadhĂŠkĂŠ|motadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:motadhathatha|motadhathatha]] || [[word:motadhajaja|motadhajaja]] || [[word:motadhashasha|motadhashasha]] || [[word:motadhakaka|motadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:motadhatha|motadhatha]] || [[word:motadhaja|motadhaja]] || [[word:motadhasha|motadhasha]] || [[word:motadhaka|motadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:motadhafthaf|motadhafthaf]] || [[word:motadhafjaf|motadhafjaf]] || [[word:motadhafshaf|motadhafshaf]] || [[word:motadhafkaf|motadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:motadhasha|motadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:motadhshĂ«asha|motadhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:motadhroasha|motadhroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:motadhmuasha|motadhmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:motadhyaasha|motadhyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomotadhnkshĂ«asha|gomotadhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomotadhnkroasha|gomotadhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomotadhnkmuasha|gomotadhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomotadhnkyaasha|gomotadhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:motatadhasha|motatadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:motatadhshĂ«asha|motatadhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:motatadhroasha|motatadhroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:motatadhmuasha|motatadhmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:motatadhyaasha|motatadhyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomotatadhnkshĂ«asha|gomotatadhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomotatadhnkroasha|gomotatadhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomotatadhnkmuasha|gomotatadhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomotatadhnkyaasha|gomotatadhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:metĂŠdhasha|metĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:metĂŠdhshĂ«asha|metĂŠdhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:metĂŠdhroasha|metĂŠdhroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:metĂŠdhmuasha|metĂŠdhmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:metĂŠdhyaasha|metĂŠdhyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gometĂŠdhnkshĂ«asha|gometĂŠdhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gometĂŠdhnkroasha|gometĂŠdhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gometĂŠdhnkmuasha|gometĂŠdhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gometĂŠdhnkyaasha|gometĂŠdhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:motfadhasha|motfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:motfadhshĂ«asha|motfadhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:motfadhroasha|motfadhroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:motfadhmuasha|motfadhmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:motfadhyaasha|motfadhyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomotfadhnkshĂ«asha|gomotfadhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomotfadhnkroasha|gomotfadhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomotfadhnkmuasha|gomotfadhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomotfadhnkyaasha|gomotfadhnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
